steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The goal is to “present cultural analysis to an audience unfamiliar with the concept.” An unfamiliar audience needs the concept itself explained—a clear definition of what cultural analysis IS, not an example or comparison.

steps.title: Choose the definition
steps.content: Choice A directly defines cultural analysis as an “approach to art criticism” that considers cultural trends, beliefs, and values. B and D focus on emphasis analysis, C provides only an example, and none of them define the concept for an unfamiliar audience. That matches choice A — A is correct.
